title: erica botuliformis
side_effects: Erica botuliformis can have side effects if used improperly, such as respiratory distress, muscle weakness, and blurred vision. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can lead to paralysis, as the toxin it contains can interfere with nerve function and communication. Additionally, individuals who ingest or inhale the plant's toxins may experience nausea, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins can also lead to long-term damage to the nervous system.
